ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the image belongs to */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of medical image (e.g., X-ray, MRI, CT scan) */,
  "image_data" TEXT /* Actual image data */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "diagnosis_status" TEXT /* Status of the diagnosis (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of the diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Patient's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Patient's gender */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Patient's phone number */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being annotated */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare professional making the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., text, label) */,
  "annotation_status" TEXT /* Status of the annotation (e.g., pending, reviewed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_annotations_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_annotations_annotator_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotator_id") REFERENCES healthcare_professionals ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_professionals" (
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare professional */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the healthcare professional */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the healthcare professional */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the healthcare professional */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Professional license number */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience in the profession */,
  "hospital_affiliation" TEXT /* Hospital or institution affiliation */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role in the institution (e.g., radiologist, surgeon) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher belongs to */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests and areas of expertise */,
  "publications" TEXT /* List of key publications */,
  "research_status" TEXT /* Current research status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being classified */,
  "classification_label" TEXT /* Label assigned to the image by the AI model */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the classification */,
  "classification_date" TEXT /* Date the classification was made */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the AI model used */,
  "classification_status" TEXT /* Status of the classification (e.g., pending, confirmed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_classifications_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "researcher1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first researcher */,
  "researcher2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second researcher */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being analyzed */,
  "collaboration_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher2_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher2_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher1_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher1_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_trainings" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the AI model being trained */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date of the training */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the training */,
  "training_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training in hours */,
  "training_status" TEXT /* Status of the training (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "trained_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the researcher who conducted the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_trainings_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES ai_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ai_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AI model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the AI model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the AI model (e.g., CNN, LSTM) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the AI model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the AI model */,
  "model_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "model_last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the model was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cct_xc_class_000_distances" (
  "distance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distance */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance value */,
  "distance_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the distance (e.g., pixels, mm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cct_xc_class_000_distances_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cct_xc_class_000_counts" (
  "count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each count */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image */,
  "count1" INTEGER /* Count 1 value */,
  "count7" INTEGER /* Count 7 value */,
  "count_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the count (e.g., cells, regions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cct_xc_class_000_counts_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)
